ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-28-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Conrad Donner, Esq., Executor (appearing by video conferencing).

Upon the Court's inquiry regarding the claimed extraordinary services of Mr. Donner as self-represented executor, Mr. Donner offers a detailed exposition of his services to the estate, including various difficulties in maintaining and selling the decedent's residence and locating various charities, including one in Israel.

The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (561 Duncan Street, San Francisco, Ca 94131-1927)
Off Calendar Oct-28-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Conrad Donner (Executor) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Donner stated that the terms of the sale are attached to the supplement filed on October 18, 2019. The Court reviewed attachment 4F. The sale was confirmed at $1,520,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Order Authorizing Executor To Act As Both Executor And As Attorney For Executor
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for Conrad Donner.

Mr. Koplowitz stated that he believes they have resolved all of the notice issues, that the property is vacant, that there is concern about vandalism, that they have contacted a Broker and that they would like to get the property fixed up and on the market. Mr. Koplowitz also stated that the probate code is very clear, that fees must be approved in advance and that he does not see what the controversy is with regard to Mr. Donner acting in both capacities. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary and the Petition for Order Authorizing Executor to Act as Both Executor and As Attorney for Executor are under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Granted Per Written Order
